disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Still passing flatus; no bilious/faeculent or copious vomiting; abdomen soft (not rigid) — argues against mechanical obstruction
trigger_question_examples: Any vomiting, especially green/bilious or vomiting that smells faeculent?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I'm still passing wind, and I haven't vomited at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No rectal bleeding, no unintentional weight loss, no new persistent change in bowel habit beyond baseline, no family history red flags
trigger_question_examples: Any blood in the stool or on the paper, or unexplained weight loss?
Is this different from your usual pattern, and any bowel cancer in the family?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blood, no weight loss; it's my usual tendency to constipation just worse, and no family bowel cancer.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No severe constant/rigid abdominal pain, no fever, not systemically unwell
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain colicky and coming-and-going, or severe, constant and getting worse?
Any fever or feeling very unwell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's crampy and comes and goes, eased by passing wind; no fever and I don't feel really unwell.
